text.title: Caching Architecture Worked Example
text.summary: One end-to-end worked example showing how caching-architecture produces a valid spec artefact.

example.title: Happy-path application
example.code:
--- artefact_id: caching-policy-shop-2026-05-23 owner: Ruslan Faion <ruslan@faion.net> ---
## Data classes
| Class | Pattern | TTL | Invalidation | Layer | |-------|---------|-----|--------------|-------| | product-detail | cache-aside | 300s ±10% | on product write | redis | | product-list | read-through | 120s ±10% | on category write | redis | | customer-cart | write-through | 1800s | on cart update | redis | | checkout-session | no-cache | - | - | none |
## Single-flight - Enabled on product-detail and product-list (redis-py distributed lock per key).
## Stampede protection - ±10% jitter on TTL.
example.note: Demonstrates the rules from 01-core-rules.xml applied to a concrete input; output validates against the schema in 02-output-contract.xml.
